entry.value: [["currentConversationId","pins","agentExecutionMode","isPanelCollapsed","displayedAnnouncements","conversations","a|0|1|2|3|4|5","da9f3982-48f9-451f-8d84-0298ed671873","o|","manual","b|F","a|","a|7","id","name","createdAtIso","lastInteractedAtIso","selectedModelId","requestIds","isPinned","isShareable","extraData","personaType","rootTaskUuid","toolUseStates","chatHistory","feedbackStates","draftExchange","a|D|E|F|G|H|I|J|K|L|M|N|O|P|Q|R","Gitignore docs folder validation\n","2026-03-27T15:36:28.629Z","2026-03-27T15:37:44.500Z","claude-sonnet-4-5","isAgentConversation","a|X","b|T","o|Y|Z","n|0","96a3effa-0fc7-4da8-9265-d9b3924f7aea","request_id","uuid","chatItemType","status","fromTimestamp","toTimestamp","seen_state","a|d|e|f|g|h|i|j","2eac21bd-9164-4d35-9319-71d8b6241ff5","937f3735-6409-4dab-8550-12e9ba27ffa0","agentic-checkpoint-delimiter","success","n|VF5AxKp","seen","o|k|l|m|n|o|b|p|q","exchangeUuid","timestamp","request_message","a|f|s|t|u|g|j","exchange-pointer","c7f8193d-9a8f-4b70-880e-36ef131ba630","2026-03-27T15:37:02.192Z","is this is the correct gitignore to ignore the all docs folder and it's content ??","o|v|w|x|y|z|o|q","ce363f94-3d60-4cd6-9e5b-ce5ee95eb7ad","2026-03-27T15:37:05.667Z","","o|v|w|11|12|13|o|q","e941cc4a-2a91-4847-a7a7-79ea5ca08416","2026-03-27T15:37:44.502Z","will thsi ignore it ??\n**/docs/","o|v|w|15|16|17|o|q","a|r|10|14|18","rich_text_json_repr","a|u|1A|g","type","content","a|1C|1D","doc","a|1C","paragraph","o|1G|1H","a|1I","o|1E|1F|1J","draft","o|1B|13|1K|1L","o|S|7|T|U|V|W|B|A|A|a|b|c|8|19|8|1M","o|C|1N","o|6|7|8|9|A|B|1O"],"1P"]
